title: fileinto/reject usable without require declaration
description: RFC 5228 §6.1 mandates that extensions must be declared with require before use. This crate enforces that declared extensions are known, but does NOT enforce that fileinto/reject/envelope are declared before use. A script 'fileinto "folder";' with no require compiles and evaluates successfully. Real Sieve interpreters (Dovecot, Cyrus) reject such scripts. This generates issues from users whose scripts work here but fail on conformant servers, and from users who expect this crate to catch the error at compile time.
